physical_description: Extent: ii, 201 unnumbered leaves : color illustrations ; 23 cm
note: Title supplied by cataloger.|In custom clamshell box (28 x 23 x 10 cm).|Contains six full-page illustrations, painted at later date, approximately early 20th century.|Illustrations, except for the first, are marked with blue thread at top right corner of page. Madonna and Child (ii verso); Saint George and the dragon (25r); the Crucifixion (57r); Jesus, possibly raising Jairus' daughter, with the disciples looking on (119r); the Last Supper (151r); the Ascension of Jesus, holding the gospels in his hands, with disciples below (182r). Note: the Ge'ez and Amharic Gospel of Mark 16:8- 9 contains an extra passage indicating "Jesus himself put in their hands the immutable and holy gospel which is given for eternal salvation."|Calligraphy in black and red ink. Single column 1r-177r; two columns, 177v-199r.|Parchment. Some pin pricks visible; several holes resulting from parchment preparation; sewn repair (ii verso); rounded corners.|Ethiopian binding with chain stitch, sewn to wooden boards with bridle attachment. Binding structure visible. Boards attached front and back, covered with tooled leather.|Catalog record includes information from Stephen Butler's description in original listing.|Provenance notes: Wäldä Śǝlasse (i recto); Wayzäro Bǝzunäš (ii recto); secondary owner is mentioned, [...] Maryam (166v); note of secondary ownership, Wäldä Amanu'el, as noted by Aśratä Maryam.

title_as_recorded: Ethiopic psalter with prayers to Mary; manuscript
subject_as_recorded: Mary, Blessed Virgin, Saint--Prayers and devotions--Texts|Ethiopic language--Texts|Manuscripts, Ethiopic|Manuscripts--Ethiopia|Psalters--Texts
physical_description: Extent: 324 unnumbered pages ; 17 x 12 cm housed in a two-part leather case.
note: Bound manuscript.|Title devised by cataloger.|Bound with dark goatskin over wooden boards with geometric designs in blind. Boards lined with cloth. Mirror fragments within the turn-ins of front board. Spine worn and front joint split.|Parachment pricked and and ruled throughout; shows some soiling, damp staining, and wear, with a few old vernacular repairs. Black ink in a fine hand with a few words or phrases in red. Four blanks with later notations.|Custom five-sided case for manuscript fits inside a case with top flap and cloth carrying straps.|Nineteen lines per page; text on last thirteen leaves is in two columns.

physical_description: Extent: 384 unnumbered pages : illustrations (some color) ; 23 x 17 cm (4to) +
note: Bound manuscript.|Title devised by cataloger.|Bound with red goat skin over wooden boards. Design tooled in blind. Christian cross in center, front and back.|Vellum pages. Text in black and red, 20 lines per page. Eighteen multicolor headpieces.|Inner slipcase of worn red morocco, design tooled in blind, is attached by straps to outer carrying case. Carrying case is worn brown-reddish morocco with design in blind and stitched decoration, with tears in leather. Leather shoulder strap.|Four blank pages, eight pages of drawings, 360 pages of text, four pages with later text, eight blank pages.
